summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg View column titled 'Trump and Statistics Don't Mix.' The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a pointer to external content. It follows a common blogging practice of cross-posting links to published work elsewhere.
key_points: The post announces a new Bloomberg View column about Trump and statistics
No substantive content is included in the blog post itself
Readers are directed to Bloomberg for the full column
key_insight: This is a link post with no analyzable content; the actual argument exists in the referenced Bloomberg column.
